{
  "model": "qwen/qwen3.5-397b-a17b",
  "summary": "Propose splitting high-variance banks by casing and semantic function, and refining bucket surfaces to reduce lexical sparsity for base Qwen.",
  "bank_repair_proposals": [
    {
      "candidate_bank_id": "sentence_opener_sequence_v0",
      "decision": "split",
      "proposed_banks": [
        {
          "new_bank_id": "sentence_opener_sequence_lower_v0",
          "anchor_kind": "sentence_boundary",
          "slot_type": "sentence_opener",
          "case_variant": "lowercase",
          "bucket_0_surfaces": ["first", "second", "third"],
          "bucket_1_surfaces": ["start", "continue", "finish"],
          "preferred_prefix_shapes": ["Step 1:", "Next,", "To begin,"],
          "why_mass_may_improve": "Isolating lowercase removes casing noise that splits token probability mass, concentrating likelihood on frequent lowercase forms.",
          "risks": ["May reduce coverage if sentence-case variants are required in context."]
        },
        {
          "new_bank_id": "sentence_opener_sequence_title_v0",
          "anchor_kind": "sentence_boundary",
          "slot_type": "sentence_opener",
          "case_variant": "sentence_case",
          "bucket_0_surfaces": ["First", "Second", "Third"],
          "bucket_1_surfaces": ["Start", "Continue", "Finish"],
          "preferred_prefix_shapes": ["1.", "2.", "3."],
          "why_mass_may_improve": "Dedicated sentence-case bank aligns with capitalization expectations at sentence starts, improving next-token prediction stability.",
          "risks": ["Splitting reduces samples per bank; requires sufficient context density."]
        }
      ],
      "reason": "High mass ratio (18.9x) indicates casing or semantic mismatch; splitting by case isolates distributions."
    },
    {
      "candidate_bank_id": "step_opener_action_v0",
      "decision": "replace",
      "proposed_banks": [
        {
          "new_bank_id": "step_opener_action_common_v0",
          "anchor_kind": "line_or_step_boundary",
          "slot_type": "bullet_or_step_opener",
          "case_variant": "lowercase",
          "bucket_0_surfaces": ["check", "review", "list"],
          "bucket_1_surfaces": ["choose", "set", "make"],
          "preferred_prefix_shapes": ["- ", "* ", "1. "],
          "why_mass_may_improve": "Restricting to most frequent verbs reduces vocabulary entropy, allowing base Qwen to assign higher mass to core action tokens.",
          "risks": ["Dropping less frequent verbs may limit expressiveness."]
        }
      ],
      "reason": "Extreme mass ratio (18.9x) suggests bucket 1 verbs are too sparse or semantically distant; focusing on high-frequency cores improves density."
    },
    {
      "candidate_bank_id": "discourse_marker_additive_v0",
      "decision": "split",
      "proposed_banks": [
        {
          "new_bank_id": "discourse_marker_additive_lower_v0",
          "anchor_kind": "clause_or_sentence_start",
          "slot_type": "discourse_marker",
          "case_variant": "lowercase",
          "bucket_0_surfaces": ["also", "plus"],
          "bucket_1_surfaces": ["too", "again"],
          "preferred_prefix_shapes": [", ", " ", "; "],
          "why_mass_may_improve": "Separating casing prevents token fragmentation; lowercase 'also' and 'again' have distinct contexts from 'Also' and 'Again'.",
          "risks": ["Requires strict casing control in prompt templates."]
        }
      ],
      "reason": "Mass ratio of 6.5x indicates significant distributional shift; casing split is the primary differentiator."
    },
    {
      "candidate_bank_id": "transition_word_plain_v0",
      "decision": "replace",
      "proposed_banks": [
        {
          "new_bank_id": "transition_word_plain_core_v0",
          "anchor_kind": "sentence_or_clause_transition",
          "slot_type": "transition_word",
          "case_variant": "both",
          "bucket_0_surfaces": ["then", "now", "next"],
          "bucket_1_surfaces": ["however", "finally", "instead"],
          "preferred_prefix_shapes": ["", " ", ", "],
          "why_mass_may_improve": "Replacing rare variants ('otherwise') with high-frequency transitions ('next') increases prior probability mass for these slots.",
          "risks": ["Changing bucket contents alters semantic flow if not carefully matched."]
        }
      ],
      "reason": "Ratio 2.3x is acceptable but mass is low; swapping rare tokens for common synonyms boosts baseline likelihood."
    },
    {
      "candidate_bank_id": "function_word_conjunction_v0",
      "decision": "keep",
      "proposed_banks": [],
      "reason": "Mass ratio 4.7x is near threshold; retaining current high-frequency conjunctions ('and', 'but') is optimal. Minor context tuning preferred over structural change."
    },
    {
      "candidate_bank_id": "function_word_preposition_v0",
      "decision": "replace",
      "proposed_banks": [
        {
          "new_bank_id": "function_word_preposition_common_v0",
          "anchor_kind": "local_function_word",
          "slot_type": "function_word_alternative",
          "case_variant": "lowercase",
          "bucket_0_surfaces": ["with", "for"],
          "bucket_1_surfaces": ["by", "to"],
          "preferred_prefix_shapes": ["used ", "made ", "created "],
          "why_mass_may_improve": "Replacing 'from' with 'to' aligns with higher frequency collocations in instructional text, increasing next-token mass.",
          "risks": ["Semantic shift from source to destination may alter meaning."]
        }
      ],
      "reason": "Ratio 5.1x exceeds limit; swapping low-mass preposition improves statistical fit."
    }
  ],
  "prompt_family_repairs": [
    {
      "family_id": "F2_8_step_checklist",
      "repair": "Ensure step bullets consistently start with lowercase verbs to match 'step_opener_action_lower_v0' bank.",
      "expected_micro_slot_gain": "Increased mass for step verbs by reducing casing variance.",
      "risk": "Inconsistent capitalization in source templates may cause mismatch."
    },
    {
      "family_id": "F4_concise_advice_with_transitions",
      "repair": "Standardize transition words to core set ('then', 'however') before the slot injection point.",
      "expected_micro_slot_gain": "Higher probability mass for transition tokens due to reduced vocabulary entropy.",
